subHeadline: Deep, permanent reference hubs for the engines and systems Land Rover owners research most — not blog posts, not one-off articles. Every guide is built on real UK enquiry data and JLR-specific expertise.

centres.title: TDV6 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Every variant, every failure, every generation it was fitted to — the 2.7 and 3.0 TDV6/SDV6 complete guide.

centres.title: SDV6 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The 3.0 V6 diesel's full ownership profile — performance, reliability, and known issues.

centres.title: Ingenium Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Petrol vs diesel reliability, pre- and post-2019 changes, and what to look for when buying.

centres.title: SDV8 Knowledge Centre
centres.description: The 4.4 V8 diesel's reliability record and running costs — the most durable engine in the range.

centres.title: Air Suspension Knowledge Centre
centres.description: Common faults, compressor failure, replacement costs, and how to diagnose EAS issues.

centres.title: Terrain Response Systems
centres.description: What goes wrong, what it costs to fix, and how to maintain JLR's advanced 4x4 system.

centres.title: ZF Gearbox Problems
centres.description: The 8-speed automatic's known issues across JLR's range — mechatronic, torque converter, and more.

centres.title: Transfer Box & Differential Problems
centres.description: 4x4 system faults by model and generation — ATC300/400 chain stretch, diff whine, and UJ failures.

footer.title: 100% Data-Verified. Built for Land Rover & Range Rover Owners.
footer.text: Every knowledge centre is built on real UK enquiry data and JLR-specific expertise.
